_note: Mini-PoC gold set for M1 authority nudge validation. 10 queries are DIRECTIONAL only — NDCG variance at n=10 is too high for statistical significance. Full L6 harness (30+ queries) will re-verify. Per-type aggregation surfaces the 'mixed results' case.
